# Auto Scan

**Summary**: A laboratory-based permeameter used as a standard for comparing measurement accuracy.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-allehyani|allehyani, 2024]] used AutoScan to establish baseline permeability measurements in the Hanifa Formation.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The AutoScan system provided consistent results with TinyPerm3 in low-permeability ranges (mean difference of 0.18 mD). ([[2024-allehyani|allehyani, 2024, p. 93]])
